calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-03-2025 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Entire Action Without Prejudice
Off Calendar Sep-08-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF JAIME MONTALVO, INDIVIDUALLY, AND ON BEHALF OF OTHER MEMBERS OF THE GENERAL PUBLIC SIMILARLY SITUATED's Motion To Dismiss Entire Action Without Prejudice.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion to dismiss the entire action without prejudice, including representative claims, is granted. Moving party has shown good cause.

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
